problem: Is dopamine dysregulation cause or effect in schizophrenia — what is primary?
mechanism: Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI
hypothesis: Combining Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 34 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
